subtitles.original: まさに千客万来
subtitles.english: Indeed, it's a massive crowd!

subtitles.original: だって party night
subtitles.english: Because it's party night!

subtitles.original: 右も左も どんとはらい
subtitles.english: Left and right, that is all!

subtitles.original: フッて湧いた チェックメイト
subtitles.english: An unexpected checkmate!

subtitles.original: ようやく今晩 ブレイコー 決行です
subtitles.english: Tonight, the wild party is finally on!

subtitles.original: 皆様 ナンセンス はなはだ ナンセンス
subtitles.english: To everyone, it's nonsense, utter nonsense!

subtitles.original: 聞き流せ 黙れ 黙れ 黙れ
subtitles.english: Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: この世は ナンセンス 誠に 遺憾です
subtitles.english: This world is nonsense, it's truly regrettable!

subtitles.original: お気の毒ね 暴れ 暴れ 暴れ
subtitles.english: What a pity! Go wild, go wild, go wild!

subtitles.original: Can't you understand?
subtitles.english: Can't you understand?

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah yeah yeah...
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah yeah yeah...

subtitles.original: 皆様 ナンセンス はなはだ ナンセンス
subtitles.english: To everyone, it's nonsense, utter nonsense!

subtitles.original: 聞き流せ 黙れ 黙れ 黙れ
subtitles.english: Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: この世は ナンセンス はなから ナンセンス
subtitles.english: This world is nonsense, nonsense from the start!

subtitles.original: 聞き流せ 黙れ 黙れ 黙れ
subtitles.english: Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!

subtitles.original: まもなく 時間です 誠に 遺憾です
subtitles.english: Time is almost up, it's truly regrettable!

subtitles.original: お気は済んだ？ 下がれ 下がれ くたばれ
subtitles.english: Had your fun? Step back, step back, drop dead!

subtitles.original: ほら精神牙剥いていってらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Now, bare your fangs and off you go!

subtitles.original: 肥大調子づいちゃってヒィカラ
subtitles.english: Getting cocky and running on empty...

subtitles.original: Ｓ・Ｒ・Ｉ・Ｐ・Ｐで御免被る
subtitles.english: Pardon me with an S-R-I-P-P!

subtitles.original: 終電で来世に会おう See you again
subtitles.english: Let's meet in the next life on the last train, see you again!

subtitles.original: うおーっ！びっくりした、あぶにゃ！
subtitles.english: Whoa! You startled me, that was close!

subtitles.original: 危ないんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: Isn't that dangerous?

subtitles.original: え？何ちゅうその動き。お前、ダンサー？
subtitles.english: Eh? What's with those moves? Are you a dancer?

subtitles.original: え、ダンサーですけど。
subtitles.english: Eh, yeah, I'm a dancer.

subtitles.original: え、私も！
subtitles.english: Eh, me too!

subtitles.original: 私もダンサーです！
subtitles.english: I'm a dancer too!

subtitles.original: え、なんかすごいダンサーがいっぱい出てきた。
subtitles.english: Whoa, suddenly a bunch of dancers appeared!

subtitles.original: え、ちょいちょい、なんかさ、はじめちゃん、ダンサーのオーディション落ちちゃってさ...
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, actually, Hajime-chan failed a dancer audition...

subtitles.original: もしかして、あそこのシアターですか？
subtitles.english: Could it be the theater over there?

subtitles.original: え、そう！
subtitles.english: Ah, yes!

subtitles.original: え、それ私も落ちました！
subtitles.english: Eh, I failed that too!

subtitles.original: えー！私も！私も私も！
subtitles.english: What?! Me too! Me too, me too!

subtitles.original: え、みんな落ちた仲間？！
subtitles.english: Wait, we're all fellow failures?!

subtitles.original: うん！ねー！
subtitles.english: Yeah! Exactly!

subtitles.original: あの審査員、センス無いよねー！
subtitles.english: Those judges have zero taste!

subtitles.original: そうそう！本当に！
subtitles.english: Totally! For real!

subtitles.original: いやいや、うちらのダンス、ちゃんと見せつけてやろうじゃ！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's show them what our dance is really about!

subtitles.original: おー！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: もう壁とは踊らないぞ、インセキュアな自分にサヨナラ！
subtitles.english: No more dancing with walls, goodbye to my insecure self...

subtitles.original: 3メートルの覇気、水を得る！
subtitles.english: 3-meter conqueror's haki, like fish to water!

subtitles.original: カオスに落ちるハコス・ベールズ！
subtitles.english: Falling into chaos, Hakos Baelz!

subtitles.original: 宇宙一の番長になる、轟はじめ！
subtitles.english: To become the universe's number one bancho, Todoroki Hajime!

subtitles.original: よし、うちらの始まりは...
subtitles.english: Alright, our beginning is...

subtitles.original: こっから！
subtitles.english: From here!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Hey boy! Ordinary boring Japan
subtitles.english: Yeah! Hey boy! Ordinary boring Japan

subtitles.original: 産ぶ声をおぎゃ 行く先はこや
subtitles.english: First cry ogya, the destination is a hut,

subtitles.original: 呑まれるいかがいかがにして 深く深く眠る魂をほれ呼び起こすか
subtitles.english: how to be swallowed. Will you wake up the soul sleeping deep underground?

subtitles.original: 知るか乗るか反るかしかめっ面 世の中確かめたい価値観のドブ価値観
subtitles.english: Do you know? In this world, take it or not, are certain values worthless?

subtitles.original: となんだってこの葛藤で 生まれたての剥き出しの規格外のギア
subtitles.english: Even with this conflict, a newborn, raw, non-standard gear is here.

subtitles.original: I can't summarize so I know, I know
subtitles.english: I can't summarize, so I know, I know.

subtitles.original: このブレーキを壊したいの、したいの
subtitles.english: I want to break this brake, I want to.

subtitles.original: これだけじゃやれねえって分かってる でもこれしかねえからこれにかかってる 間違ってる未来でも俺には光ってる Let it fire!
subtitles.english: I know I can't do this alone, but this is all I have, so everything depends on this. Even in a wrong future, it shines for me. Let it fire!

subtitles.original: 燃やす闘志 その手少し ぶっ壊し通しようもないままが自分なんだ
subtitles.english: Burning this fighting spirit, breaking it all, my helpless self is who I am!

subtitles.original: Get up, stand up, こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Get up, stand up, it starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの闘志 持って少し 夢と添い遂げられるはずなんだ
subtitles.english: Carrying that old fighting spirit, I should be able to live out my dreams.

subtitles.original: Get up, stand up, こっから、こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Get up, stand up, it starts from here, right here!

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 4 順番通り
subtitles.english: 1 2 3 4, in order,

subtitles.original: 言ってないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just as planned, even if I didn't say so.

subtitles.original: Rollin' Rollin' 転がっていけ
subtitles.english: Rollin', rollin', let's roll away!

subtitles.original: よりどり緑の一生
subtitles.english: A life full of endless choices.

subtitles.original: 1 2 3 4 順番通り
subtitles.english: 1 2 3 4, in order,

subtitles.original: 言ってないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just as planned, even if I didn't say so.

subtitles.original: Rollin' Rollin' 転がっていこう こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Rollin', rollin', let's roll away! It starts from here.

subtitles.original: え、こっからどっからわからんだって 燃料切れならすっからかん
subtitles.english: Ayy, I don't know where from here, because the fuel is completely empty.

subtitles.original: 空っ風に笑う楽観主義が 生むはまさに難関
subtitles.english: Optimism laughing in the dry wind only breeds difficulties.

subtitles.original: 一人になりたくても人だらけ 避けたくだらん耳も一苦労なわけ
subtitles.english: Even if I want to be alone, it's crowded. Tuning out the nonsense is hard work.

subtitles.original: 惹かれたくないサレンダーピープル でもどこいたってピポピポピポ
subtitles.english: I don't want to be drawn to those surrender people, but wherever I go, there are sirens.

subtitles.original: 黄信号ずっと進行
subtitles.english: A yellow light, always moving forward,

subtitles.original: 死亡した先はあることレッドカードで
subtitles.english: even if death awaits with a red card.

subtitles.original: ははっ、足りない何だった？ Come on!
subtitles.english: Haha, what was missing? Come on!

subtitles.original: よりどり緑ってさっき言ったろ？
subtitles.english: I told you earlier, it's full of choices, right?

subtitles.original: あれこれ心が荒立つくらい
subtitles.english: My heart is rough with all these things,

subtitles.original: 言いたかったことが晴天の霹靂
subtitles.english: and what I wanted to say came out of the blue.

subtitles.original: しかし悔しさで黒く燃える腹ん中
subtitles.english: But inside, my gut burns black with regret.

subtitles.original: 燃やせ！燃やせ！燃やせ！
subtitles.english: Burn it! Burn it! Burn it!

subtitles.original: 燃やす闘志 その手少し ぶっ壊し通しようもないままが自分なんだ
subtitles.english: Burning this fighting spirit, breaking it all, my helpless self is who I am!

subtitles.original: Get up, stand up, こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Get up, stand up, it starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの闘志 持って少し 夢と添い遂げられるはずんだ
subtitles.english: Carrying that old fighting spirit, I should be able to live out my dreams.

subtitles.original: Get up, stand up, こっから、こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: Get up, stand up, it starts from here, right here!

subtitles.original: One, two, three, let's go!
subtitles.english: One, two, three, let's go!

responses.thoughts:
**Here's the breakdown of my thinking regarding the video segment provided:**

Okay, here's the deal. I need to get subtitles done for this video. It's got three parts: two songs sandwiching a comedic skit.

First up, from 00:00.000 to 01:17.000, is "ナンセンス" (Nonsense) by Todoroki Hajime from Hololive ReGLOSS. Let's transcribe that, I have to be extremely accurate with the lyrics here!

*   00:00.000-00:03.500: "Indeed, it's a massive crowd!"
*   00:04.100-00:05.700: "Because it's party night!"
*   00:06.000-00:08.000: "Left and right, that is all!"
*   00:08.100-00:09.900: "An unexpected checkmate!"
*   00:10.000-00:12.700: "Tonight, the wild party is finally on!"
*   00:13.000-00:16.800: "To everyone, it's nonsense, utter nonsense!"
*   00:16.900-00:20.900: "Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!"
*   00:21.000-00:25.000: "This world is nonsense, it's truly regrettable!"
*   00:25.100-00:29.000: "What a pity! Go wild, go wild, go wild!"
*   00:29.100-00:32.400: "Can't you understand?"
*   00:33.000-00:37.000: "Yeah yeah yeah yeah..."
*   00:44.500-00:48.500: "To everyone, it's nonsense, utter nonsense!"
*   00:48.600-00:52.500: "Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!"
*   00:52.700-00:56.600: "This world is nonsense, nonsense from the start!"
*   00:56.700-01:00.400: "Just ignore it, shut up, shut up, shut up!"
*   01:00.500-01:04.200: "Time is almost up, it's truly regrettable!"
*   01:04.300-01:08.500: "Had your fun? Step back, step back, drop dead!"
*   01:08.800-01:10.800: "Now, bare your fangs and off you go!"
*   01:11.000-01:13.000: "Getting cocky and running on empty..."
*   01:13.100-01:14.600: "Pardon me with an S-R-I-P-P!"
*   01:14.700-01:18.000: "Let's meet in the next life on the last train, see you again!"

Next, we have the skit which runs from 01:33.000 to 02:32.000. It seems to have Todoroki Hajime, Hakos Baelz, Kobo Kanaeru, and Vestia Zeta (maybe Kaela Kovalskia too, but let's check closely who's there). The core theme is an audition failure and shared aspirations. Here's what's going on:

*   01:33.500-01:35.000: Baelz: "Whoa! You startled me, that was close!"
*   01:35.000-01:37.500: Baelz: "Isn't that dangerous?"
*   01:37.500-01:4
